Class GemBank

java.lang.Object
splendor.entities.GemBank
public class GemBank extends Object
Tracks the shared supply of gem tokens.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GemBank(int numPlayers)
    Creates a bank with Splendor's token counts for 2 to 4 players.

  • Constructor Details

    • GemBank

      public GemBank(int numPlayers)
      Creates a bank with Splendor's token counts for 2 to 4 players.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if numPlayers is not 2, 3, or 4
